creator: lifanov@freebsd.org
text:
Can you fix these dependencies please?

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: /usr/local/bin/delaboratory is linked to /usr/local/lib/libxml2.so.2 from textproc/libxml2 but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need USE_GNOME+=libxml2
Error: /usr/local/bin/delaboratory is linked to /usr/local/lib/libtiff.so.5 from graphics/tiff but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libtiff.so:graphics/tiff
